message:
fix(analytics): improve GA measurement ID sanitization for edge cases

The sanitization now:
- Removes trailing `\n` that can appear from Vercel CLI env pulls
- Uses regex extraction instead of strict matching to handle garbage
- Also fixes GA_API_SECRET sanitization for the same issue

This fixes client-side pageview tracking not working when env vars have
trailing escaped newlines from `vercel env pull`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
